repositories.name: cryptomator
repositories.description: Cryptomator for Windows, macOS, and Linux: Secure client-side encryption for your cloud storage, ensuring privacy and control over your data.

repositories.name: i2p.i2p
repositories.description: I2P is an anonymizing network, offering a simple layer that identity-sensitive applications can use to securely communicate. All data is wrapped with several layers of encryption, and the network is both distributed and dynamic, with no trusted parties.

repositories.name: joplin
repositories.description: Joplin - the privacy-focused note taking app with sync capabilities for Windows, macOS, Linux, Android and iOS.

repositories.name: sparrow
repositories.description: Desktop Bitcoin Wallet focused on security and privacy. Free and open source.

repositories.name: Materialious
repositories.description: Materialious is a modern material design frontend for YouTube & Invidious, focused on a clean, privacy-friendly YouTube experience. It supports local video fallback when Invidious fails and is available on Web, Desktop, Android, and Android TV.

repositories.name: activitywatch
repositories.description: The best free and open-source automated time tracker. Cross-platform, extensible, privacy-focused.

repositories.name: kopia
repositories.description: Cross-platform backup tool for Windows, macOS & Linux with fast, incremental backups, client-side end-to-end encryption, compression and data deduplication. CLI and GUI included.

repositories.name: PeaZip
repositories.description: Free Zip / Unzip software and Rar file extractor. Cross-platform file and archive manager. Features volume spanning, compression, authenticated encryption. Supports 7Z, 7-Zip sfx, ACE, ARJ, Brotli, BZ2, CAB, CHM, CPIO, DEB, GZ, ISO, JAR, LHA/LZH, NSIS, OOo, PAQ/LPAQ, PEA, QUAD, RAR, RPM, split, TAR, Z, ZIP, ZIPX, Zstandard.

repositories.name: openwhispr
repositories.description: Voice-to-text dictation app with local (Nvidia Parakeet/Whisper) and cloud models (BYOK). Privacy-first and available cross-platform.

repositories.name: WalletWasabi
repositories.description: Open-source, non-custodial, privacy preserving Bitcoin wallet for Windows, Linux, and Mac.

repositories.name: cartero
repositories.description: The free, lightweight and multiplatform graphical HTTP client that respects your privacy.

repositories.name: firo
repositories.description: The privacy-focused cryptocurrency

repositories.name: GpgFrontend
repositories.description: A modern "Enigma" for OpenPGP. It makes encryption, signing, and key management easier and more trustworthy in everyday privacy workflows.

repositories.description: There can be more than Notion and Miro. AFFiNE(pronounced [ə‘fain]) is a next-gen knowledge base that brings planning, sorting and creating all together. Privacy first, open-source, customizable and ready to use.

Meetily (Meetly Ai - https://meetily.ai) is the #1 Self-hosted,  Open-source Ai meeting note taker for macOS & Windows.

repositories.name: DeepCamera

LLM-powered agentic security camera agent — watches, understands, remembers & guards your home via Telegram, Discord or Slack. Pluggable AI skills. OpenAI, Google, Anthropic or local AI. Runs on Mac Mini & AI PC.
